pool_features: 15 x 5 meter swimming pool with depths varying from 1.10 to 1.40 meters
interiors_summary: The villa features five recently renovated double rooms with bathrooms, plus a double sofa bed, for a total of 12 beds. The interiors have a noble feel reminiscent of the 1800s family who occupied the property. It includes an ancient solid wood entrance door, a reception room, laundry service area, staircase to the first floor, kitchen with dining room overlooking the garden, large living room with fireplace, and four double bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms on the second floor.
exteriors_summary: Surrounded by ten hectares of park, the villa features a 15 x 5 meter swimming pool with depths varying from 1.10 to 1.40 meters, large umbrellas and loungers for guest relaxation, and breathtaking views of olive trees and vineyards. Outdoors seating is available for al fresco meals or enjoying the surrounding landscape.
location_summary: Strategically located in Montecatini Terme, the villa is close to Florence, Pisa, and Siena, as well as Versilia beaches and Pinocchio park. It's less than 10 minutes from the Montecatini Terme exit on the A11.
included_in_price: Linen and towels (change once per week)
not_included: Electricity over 200 kw per week (0.80 € per kw)
the_catch: Cancellation policy: 20% refund if cancelled more than 60 days prior, full non-refundable if within 59 days. Final payment must be made 60 days before arrival or full amount is due for booking confirmation. Payment methods include wire transfer, credit card (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), and cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, USD Tether, Ethereum). Rental Agreement becomes invalid with delayed final payment of at least 50 days. A deposit of 50% required for reservations more than 60 days prior to arrival. Booking procedure and cancellation policy may vary depending on the villa.
title: Montecatini Hilltop Villa
